response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced senior software engineer, but his background is almost entirely in web and application development (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang), which is a severe mismatch for an embedded networking firmware role. He critically lacks the required native-level Japanese proficiency, strong C programming for UNIX, Linux kernel experience, and any specific knowledge of the networking (L2/L3, switches) or security (MACsec, 802.1X) technologies central to this position.
strengths: Extensive experience as a senior and staff-level software engineer across multiple companies.
Broad technical knowledge in web, backend, and application development.
Strong engagement with the tech community through open-source projects, workshops, and talks.
concerns: Complete lack of the required native-level Japanese language proficiency.
Experience is in web technologies (Node.js, TypeScript), not the required embedded C programming.
No demonstrated experience with L2/L3 networking, LAN switches, or the specified security protocols.
